feat_arc_spellcasting.name: Arcanist's Spellcasting
feat_arc_spellcasting.description: As a student of arcane magic, you have a spellbook containing spells that show the first glimmerings of your true power. Your spellbook is your font of power. You must be wielding it to perform the Spellcasting feature of this class.

feat_arc_recovery.name: Arcane Recovery
feat_arc_recovery.description: You have learned to regain some of your magical energy by studying your spellbook. Once per day when you finish a short rest, you can recover spell slots with a combined level equal to half your level.

feat_arc_scripture.name: Arcane Scripture
feat_arc_scripture.description: Details regarding your arcane scripture and notation...

feat_arc_tradition.name: Arcane Tradition
feat_arc_tradition.description: When you reach 2nd level, you choose an arcane tradition, shaping your practice of magic.

feat_arc_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_arc_asi.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1.

feat_sorcerer_spellcasting.name: Sorcerer's Spellcasting
feat_sorcerer_spellcasting.description: An event in your past left an indelible mark on you, infusing you with arcane magic. You are your own font of power.

feat_sorcerous_origin.name: Sorcerous Origin
feat_sorcerous_origin.description: Choose a sorcerous origin (e.g., Draconic Bloodline).

feat_font_of_magic.name: Font of Magic
feat_font_of_magic.description: You tap into a deep wellspring of magic represented by sorcery points.

feat_metamagic.name: Metamagic
feat_metamagic.description: You gain the ability to twist your spells to suit your needs.

feat_sorcerous_versatility.name: Sorcerous Versatility
feat_sorcerous_versatility.description: Replace one Metamagic option with another when you gain an ASI level.

feat_sorcerer_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1.

feat_magical_guidance.name: Magical Guidance
feat_magical_guidance.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a failed ability check.

feat_metamagic_additional_10.name: Additional Metamagic Option
feat_metamagic_additional_10.description: You gain an additional Metamagic option.

feat_metamagic_additional_17.name: Additional Metamagic Option
feat_metamagic_additional_17.description: You gain an additional Metamagic option.

feat_sorcerous_restoration.name: Sorcerous Restoration
feat_sorcerous_restoration.description: Regain 4 sorcery points on a short rest.

feat_draconic_ancestor.name: Dragon Ancestor
feat_draconic_ancestor.description: Choose a dragon type. Double PB for Charisma checks with dragons.

feat_draconic_resilience.name: Draconic Resilience
feat_draconic_resilience.description: +1 HP per level. Unarmored AC = 13 + Dex.

feat_elemental_affinity.name: Elemental Affinity
feat_elemental_affinity.description: Add Cha mod to damage of your draconic element.

feat_dragon_wings.name: Dragon Wings
feat_dragon_wings.description: Sprout wings and gain fly speed equal to walk speed.

feat_draconic_presence.name: Draconic Presence
feat_draconic_presence.description: Spend 5 sorcery points to exude an aura of awe or fear.
